mapper.select: SELECT UserId, FullName, Username, Email, Phone, Address, RoleName, CreatedAt FROM Users ORDER BY CreatedAt DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO Users (FullName, Username, Email, PasswordHash, Phone, Address, RoleName) VALUES (#{fullName}, #{userName}, #{email}, #{passwordHash}, #{phone}, #{address}, #{roleName})
mapper.update: UPDATE Users SET RoleName = #{roleName} WHERE UserId = #{userId}
UPDATE Users SET PasswordHash = #{password} WHERE UserId = #{userId}
